scripts.rebuild-extensions: npm run clean-extensions && npm run build-extensions
scripts.bootstrap-dev: NODE_ENV=development && npm run import && directus bootstrap && node scripts/apply.js && directus start
scripts.start:prod: NODE_ENV=production && directus bootstrap && npm run import && directus start
scripts.export: rm -rf snapshot && directus schema snapshot --yes ./snapshot.yaml && npm run split
scripts.import: rm -rf merged-snapshot.yaml && npm run merge && directus schema apply --yes ./merged-snapshot.yaml
